initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    calendar_year,
    segment,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_transaction), 2) AS avg_wholesale_price,
    ROUND(MAX(avg_transaction), 2) AS max_wholesale_price,
    ROUND(MIN(avg_transaction), 2) AS min_wholesale_price,
    ROUND(MAX(avg_transaction) - MIN(avg_transaction), 2) AS wholesale_price_difference,
    ROUND(SUM(avg_transaction), 2) AS total_wholesale_price,
    ROUND(SUM(sales), 2) AS total_selling_price,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN avg_transaction > sales THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 2) AS avg_loss_rate,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN avg_transaction > sales THEN avg_transaction - sales ELSE 0.0 END), 2) AS total_loss,
    ROUND(SUM(sales - avg_transaction), 2) AS profit
FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
WHERE calendar_year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2023
GROUP BY calendar_year, segment
ORDER BY calendar_year ASC, segment ASC;

FROM cleaned_weekly_sales

SELECT 
    calendar_year,
    segment,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_transaction), 2) AS avg_wholesale_price,
    ROUND(MAX(avg_transaction), 2) AS max_wholesale_price,
    ROUND(MIN(avg_transaction), 2) AS min_wholesale_price,
    ROUND(MAX(avg_transaction) - MIN(avg_transaction), 2) AS wholesale_price_difference,
    ROUND(SUM(sales), 2) AS total_wholesale_price,
    ROUND(SUM(sales), 2) AS total_selling_price,
    ROUND(0.00, 2) AS avg_loss_rate,
    ROUND(0.00, 2) AS total_loss,
    ROUND(SUM(sales) - SUM(sales), 2) AS profit
FROM 
    cleaned_weekly_sales
WHERE 
    calendar_year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2023
GROUP BY 
    calendar_year, segment
ORDER BY 
    calendar_year ASC, segment ASC;
